ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_towers" (
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell tower */,
  "tower_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell tower */,
  "cell_index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell within the tower */,
  "cell_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the cell tower */,
  "cell_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the cell tower */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the cell tower in meters */,
  "azimuth" INTEGER /* Azimuth angle of the cell tower in degrees */,
  "electrical_downtilt" INTEGER /* Electrical downtilt angle of the cell tower in degrees */,
  "mechanical_downtilt" INTEGER /* Mechanical downtilt angle of the cell tower in degrees */,
  "frequency_band" INTEGER /* Frequency band used by the cell tower */,
  "rs_power" REAL /* Reference Signal Power (RS Power) in dBm */,
  "cell_altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the cell tower in meters */,
  "cell_building_height" INTEGER /* Building height of the cell tower in meters */,
  "cell_clutter_index" INTEGER /* Clutter index of the area around the cell tower */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the cell tower was installed */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the cell tower */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the cell tower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell tower */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the data point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the data point */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the data point in meters */,
  "building_height" INTEGER /* Building height at the data point in meters */,
  "clutter_index" INTEGER /* Clutter index of the area around the data point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the data point in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the data point as a percentage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the data point (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_quality" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental data record */,
  "rsrp" REAL /* Received Signal Reference Power (RSRP) in dBm */,
  "sinr" REAL /* Signal to Interference plus Noise Ratio (SINR) in dB */,
  "rss" REAL /* Received Signal Strength (RSS) in dBm */,
  "rssi" REAL /* Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) in dBm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell tower */,
  "cell_index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell within the tower */,
  "cell_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the cell */,
  "cell_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the cell */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the cell in meters */,
  "azimuth" INTEGER /* Azimuth angle of the cell in degrees */,
  "electrical_downtilt" INTEGER /* Electrical downtilt angle of the cell in degrees */,
  "mechanical_downtilt" INTEGER /* Mechanical downtilt angle of the cell in degrees */,
  "frequency_band" INTEGER /* Frequency band used by the cell */,
  "rs_power" REAL /* Reference Signal Power (RS Power) in dBm */,
  "cell_altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the cell in meters */,
  "cell_building_height" INTEGER /* Building height of the cell in meters */,
  "cell_clutter_index" INTEGER /* Clutter index of the area around the cell */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the cell in MHz */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the cell in Mbps */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towers" (
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell tower */,
  "tower_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell tower */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cell tower */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the cell tower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the cell tower */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the cell tower is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the cell tower is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the cell tower is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, coverage) */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell tower */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "rsrp_data" TEXT /* RSRP data included in the report */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Environmental data included in the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_reports_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_reports_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenances" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell tower */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id")
)
